news.title: Why Did Costco Stock Fall Today? Because It Had ‘Little Room for Error’
news.summary: Costco shares fell on Thursday after the retailer’s June sales fell slightly short of Wall Street’s high expectations.

news.title: Costco shares fall after June sales update, Bank of America remains bullish
news.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST, XETRA:CTO) shares fell about 4% to $913 on Wednesday after the warehouse retailer reported a moderation in June comparable sales growth, though Bank of America analysts maintained their ‘Buy’ rating, arguing the company's value-focused strategy and...

news.title: Costco Stock Slides on June Sales Report
news.summary: Costco’s stock fell 4% Thursday, on pace for its largest decline since April 2025, after it reported June sales figures that grew slightly less than the previous month. June sales rose 10.6%, the retailer said, down from 13.

news.title: Costco (COST) Launches Digital Wallet To Speed Up In Store Checkout
news.summary: Costco Wholesale has rolled out a new digital wallet feature in its mobile app. The tool lets members link any Visa card for quicker in store checkout. This launch represents a material update to Costco's digital member experience. news.title: Popular snack brand closes plant, cuts 345 jobs
news.summary: Food manufacturing companies continue to grow even as the jobs behind familiar grocery products shift. news.title: Costco's Comparable Sales Stay Strong Despite Slower June Growth
news.summary: Costco's June sales growth slows from prior months, but resilient demand, digital strength and value pricing keep comparable sales strong.

news.title: Own Costco For Its Value Focus? Dollar Tree Is Making A Case.
news.summary: Costco is the undisputed king of value retail, but slowing growth and a rich valuation clash with Dollar Tree's rising profits and a rare guidance upgrade.
